description: Create a 'Master-Detail' dashboard tiddler titled 'Medication Explorer' tagged 'Dashboard'. The dashboard must feature a two-column layout where the left pane lists all tiddlers tagged 'Medication'. Selecting a medication from the list must update the state tiddler '$:/state/selected-med'. The right pane must dynamically display the selected medication's details. If no selection is made, display "Please select a medication." When a medication is selected, the detail pane must show the title as a heading, the labels 'Class:', 'Indications:', and 'Side Effects:' followed by the values from the 'drug-class', 'indications', and 'common-side-effects' fields, and the body text of the selected tiddler.
